content: Welcome to your new project! I can help you edit it however you want. What would you like to do?
Can you add a button component to the page that says 'Click me'?
Please go to the "Components" tab on the MakeInfinite studio, drag and drop the button component into the canvas, and let me know once it's added. I can then help you customize it further!
